samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand A (multiplicand).</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand B (multiplier).</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output for the product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg>temp [7:0]</reg> for storing the shifted value of A.
            <reg>sum [15:0]</reg> for accumulating the partial products.
        </sequential_logic>
        <always_comb>
            <for> loop to iterate through each bit of B.</for>
            <if> statement to check if the current bit of B is 1.</if>
            <reg>sum</reg> = <reg>sum</reg> + <variable>A</variable>;
            <variable>temp</variable> = <variable>temp</variable> & << 1;
            <if> statement to check if the current bit of B is 0.</if>
            <variable>temp</variable> = <variable>temp</variable> & << 1;
        </always_comb>
        <assign> statement to assign the final value of sum to product.</assign>
    </implementation>
</module>
